card_description: Hegel (German: "Unknown") is a historical figure appearing in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. In the philosophical tradition, Hegel is 19th century idealist; dialectical progression of Spirit. PKD uses Hegelian dialectic in his theology of thesis-antithesis-synthesis. Appears in 10 Exegesis passages. Associated with dictionary terms: Hegel. Context: "Dick discovers that his 3-74 vision "confirms" Hegel's philosophy of history: that God (Spirit) develops himself toward perfection through the dialectical growth of human freedom."
